data.title: Pharma Industry Faces Jitters As Trump Hints At Historic Tariffs, BofA Outlines Probable Timeline
data.description: Trump hints at major tariffs on foreign pharmaceuticals, sparking concerns for Indian suppliers and potential hikes in U.S. drug costs.

data.title: Bank Shares Are Up Today: What You Need To Know
data.description: Bank shares such as Ameris Bancorp and BancFirst Corp. are trading higher Wednesday in response to a surprise announcement from President Donald Trump to temporarily pause certain tariffs.

data.title: Machinery Stocks Are Up Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Machinery shares such as Arcosa and Valmont Industries are trading higher Wednesday on news that President Donald Trump would pause tariffs for most U.S. trading partners.

data.title: 12 Communication Services Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
Oil, Gas Stocks Jump After Trump Pauses Tariffs For U.S. Allies, Isolates China
data.description: Oil and gas stocks such as APA Corporation, BP and Exxon Mobil are trading higher Wednesday after President Donald Trump announced a 90-day pause on reciprocal tariffs for countries that have not retaliated against U.S. trade measures.
